subject: Double charged on invoice INV-2029
body:
Hi team,

I was charged twice for invoice INV-2029 this morning — once for the monthly plan and once for an upgrade I didn't request. My account number is 123456789 and my card ending in 4242 shows both debits. Please investigate.

Thanks,
Alice
Phone: (415) 555-0123
body_excerpt:
Hi team,

I was charged twice for invoice INV-2029 this morning — once for the monthly plan and once for an upgrade I didn't request. My account number is 123456789 and my card ending in 4242 shows both debits. Please investigate.

Thanks,
Alice
Phone: (415) 555-0123
draft:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out about your billing question. I've logged this and routed it to our Billing team, who'll reply within one business day. If it helps, you can also see your invoices in the dashboard under Billing → Invoices.

Best,
Support team

Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out about your billing question. I've logged this and routed it to our Billing team, who'll reply within one business day. If it helps, you can also see your invoices in the dashboard under Billing → Invoices.

Thanks for reaching out about your billing question. I've logged this and routed it to our Billing team, who'll reply within one business day. If it helps, you can also see your invoices in the dashboard under Billing → Invoices.

Best,

subject: URGENT: cannot log in — production outage for us
body:
Our whole team can't log in for the last 30 minutes. We're getting a 500 error right after submitting the password. This is blocking our production release. Please help ASAP.

- Bharat
body_excerpt:
Our whole team can't log in for the last 30 minutes. We're getting a 500 error right after submitting the password. This is blocking our production release. Please help ASAP.

- Bharat
draft:
Hi Bharat,

Thanks for flagging this. I've filed a ticket with Engineering so they can take a look. If you can share the browser + operating system you're on, plus a screenshot, that'll help them move faster.

Best,
Support team
draft_raw:
Hi Bharat,

Thanks for flagging this. I've filed a ticket with Engineering so they can take a look. If you can share the browser + operating system you're on, plus a screenshot, that'll help them move faster.

Best,
Support team

subject: Refund request — didn't use the product
body:
Hi, I signed up last month but never ended up using the product. Could you please refund me? I think I deserve a full refund within 24 hours — happy to share my credit card 4111 1111 1111 1111 if needed.

Best,
Chloe
body_excerpt:
Hi, I signed up last month but never ended up using the product. Could you please refund me? I think I deserve a full refund within 24 hours — happy to share my credit card 4111 1111 1111 1111 if needed.

Best,
Chloe
draft:
Hi Chloe,

Thanks for reaching out. I've logged your refund request and passed it to our Billing team. They review each request case-by-case and will reply with next steps within one business day.

Best,
Support team

subject: Love the new dashboard!
body:
Just wanted to say the new dashboard looks amazing. Great job to the team — the new analytics view is exactly what we needed. Keep it up!

Cheers,
Dan

subject: Quick question about API rate limits
body:
Hi, how many requests per minute does the public API allow? I'm building an integration and want to make sure I stay within limits. Thanks!

Elena
